languages.text: "Вы проявляете либо проницательность, либо осведомленность. Я ценю оба качества, если они мне на руку. Докладывайте."

traits.locale_text: "Вы проявляете либо проницательность, либо осведомленность. Я ценю оба качества, если они мне на руку. Докладывайте."

languages.text: "You are either very perceptive or very well-informed. I appreciate both qualities if they are to my advantage. Report."
languages.original_text: "Вы проявляете либо проницательность, либо осведомленность. Я ценю оба качества, если они мне на руку. Докладывайте."

traits.locale_text: "You are either very perceptive or very well-informed. I appreciate both qualities if they are to my advantage. Report."
"You are either very perceptive or very well-informed. I appreciate both qualities if they are to my advantage. Report."
"You are either very perceptive or very well-informed. I appreciate both qualities if they are to my advantage. Report."

languages.text: “你要么心思敏锐，要么就是消息灵通。只要于我有利，这两种优点我都非常欣赏。开始汇报吧。”
languages.original_text: "You are either very perceptive or very well-informed. I appreciate both qualities if they are to my advantage. Report."

traits.locale_text: “你要么心思敏锐，要么就是消息灵通。只要于我有利，这两种优点我都非常欣赏。开始汇报吧。”

languages.text: « Soit vous êtes très perspicace, soit vous êtes bien {mf|informé|informée}. Deux qualités que j'apprécie autant l'une que l'autre, pour peu qu'elles servent mes intérêts. Au rapport. »
languages.original_text: "You are either very perceptive or very well-informed. I appreciate both qualities if they are to my advantage. Report."

traits.locale_text: « Soit vous êtes très perspicace, soit vous êtes bien {mf|informé|informée}. Deux qualités que j'apprécie autant l'une que l'autre, pour peu qu'elles servent mes intérêts. Au rapport. »

languages.text: "Ya fazla öngörülüsünüz ya da oldukça bilgilisiniz. Benim yararıma olduğu sürece her iki niteliği de takdir ederim. Rapor ver."
languages.original_text: "You are either very perceptive or very well-informed. I appreciate both qualities if they are to my advantage. Report."

traits.locale_text: "Ya fazla öngörülüsünüz ya da oldukça bilgilisiniz. Benim yararıma olduğu sürece her iki niteliği de takdir ederim. Rapor ver."

languages.text: «O es muy perceptiv{mf|o|a} o está muy bien informad{mf|o|a}. Agradezco ambas cualidades cuando se usan a mi favor. Informe».
languages.original_text: "You are either very perceptive or very well-informed. I appreciate both qualities if they are to my advantage. Report."

traits.locale_text: «O es muy perceptiv{mf|o|a} o está muy bien informad{mf|o|a}. Agradezco ambas cualidades cuando se usan a mi favor. Informe».

languages.text: "Ihr seid entweder scharfsinnig oder sehr gut informiert. Ich schätze beide Eigenschaften, wenn sie mir einen Vorteil bringen. Sprecht."
languages.original_text: "You are either very perceptive or very well-informed. I appreciate both qualities if they are to my advantage. Report."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr seid entweder scharfsinnig oder sehr gut informiert. Ich schätze beide Eigenschaften, wenn sie mir einen Vorteil bringen. Sprecht."

languages.text: 「あなたは非常に鋭い洞察力を持っていたり、あるいは非常によく情報を得ている。どちらの性質も、私にとって有利であれば、私はそれを高く評価する。報告せよ。」
languages.original_text: "You are either very perceptive or very well-informed. I appreciate both qualities if they are to my advantage. Report."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたは非常に鋭い洞察力を持っていたり、あるいは非常によく情報を得ている。どちらの性質も、私にとって有利であれば、私はそれを高く評価する。報告せよ。」
